auth.title: Start your PlifeOS workspace
auth.copy: Use a guest profile with a random user ID on this device and start tracking instantly.
auth.guestCopy: Instant access with a random local user ID.
auth.privateCopy: Your current release keeps data on this device unless you export it.
hero.copy: Track money, routines, notes, tasks, and daily life in one calm offline workspace.
language.label: Language
dashboard.title: Your day at a glance
backup.title: Local Backup
backup.copy: Keep a portable Excel-friendly CSV copy of your offline data whenever you want.
backup.fileTooLarge: Backup file is too large. Keep imports under 2 MB.
backup.invalid: Backup file is invalid. Use a PlifeOS CSV backup or a legacy JSON backup.
footer.disclaimer: PlifeOS is a personal life operating system. It does not provide financial, medical, or legal advice.
toolsPanel.title: All tools
quickAdd.title: Add with one line
quickAdd.copy: Try a command like coffee 50, borrow ram 200, task call bank, or journal Today felt focused.
quickAdd.invalid: Try a command like coffee 50, task call bank, or journal Today felt focused.
onboarding.title: How to use PlifeOS in under a minute
onboarding.started: You already have data here. Use these shortcuts to keep the flow simple.
onboarding.empty: Your dashboard is ready. Start with one quick action, then the app will build around your routine.
onboarding.step1Copy: Open Expenses and try coffee 50, or add your next grocery item.
onboarding.step2Copy: PlifeOS updates totals, categories, and this week's spending automatically.
onboarding.step3Copy: Use Export once in a while so your offline data stays portable and safe.
trust.title: Stay safe and in control
trust.budgetHint: Set a budget in Expenses to unlock alerts.
trust.backupNever: No export found yet on this device.
activity.title: Recent activity
activity.empty: Your latest actions will appear here as you add expenses, notes, grocery items, and more.
weekly.title: Weekly summary
diagnostics.title: Diagnostics & Recovery
diagnostics.subtitle: Review backups, storage health, and local errors
diagnostics.copy: Review workspace health, backup freshness, storage version, and recent local errors before something becomes a problem.
diagnostics.backupNever: No local backup export recorded yet.
diagnostics.noErrors: No local runtime errors logged right now.
diagnostics.resetConfirm: Reset this workspace on this device? Export a backup first if you need one.
settings.title: Settings & Preferences
settings.subtitle: Manage app preferences, category learning, and backups.
settings.copy: Review your workspace profile, manage category learning, and keep your backup habits healthy.
settings.appearanceCopy: Choose the look that feels best on this device. System mode follows your phone or desktop preference automatically.
settings.categoriesCopy: PlifeOS remembers the category you choose for an expense name so future quick adds stay smarter.
settings.categoriesEmpty: No learned mappings yet. Add or edit expenses with categories and PlifeOS will remember them here.
settings.backupCopy: Export a CSV backup regularly so your offline workspace stays portable across browser resets and device changes.
update.title: A new PlifeOS update is ready
update.copy: Refresh to switch to the latest version and keep your offline tools current.
installHelp.title: Install PlifeOS on iPhone or iPad
installHelp.step1Copy: If you are using Chrome or another iPhone browser, open PlifeOS in Safari first.
installHelp.step2Copy: Use the Share icon in Safari to open the action sheet.
installHelp.step3Copy: After that, PlifeOS can launch in standalone mode from your home screen.
changelog.title: What's New in v10.13
changelog.item1Copy: PlifeOS now uses safer mobile spacing, stronger install metadata, and better older-device layout fallbacks.
changelog.item2Copy: The default dark theme now matches the first-load theme color and installed app presentation more closely.
changelog.item3Copy: Safe-area spacing, blur fallbacks, and touch behavior are more reliable on tablets and older-but-modern phones.
insights.empty: No spending trends yet. Add a few entries to unlock insights, budgets, and smarter weekly tracking.
tool.expensesIntro: Capture a spend quickly, organize it with your own categories, and review your running history.
tool.borrowedIntro: Keep a neat running view of who owes what, edit entries quickly, and browse older records page by page.
tool.groceryIntro: Drop in items fast, edit them cleanly, and browse older grocery additions page by page.
tool.habitsIntro: Track the habits you want to repeat daily, mark them done, and keep your momentum visible offline.
tool.notesIntro: Save quick ideas, reminders, and reference notes without leaving your offline workspace.
tool.tasksIntro: Keep a simple today list, mark things done, and stay focused without opening a separate task app.
tool.journalIntro: Capture how the day felt, save quick reflections, and keep a simple offline memory of your progress.
tool.subscriptionsIntro: Track monthly recurring costs so you always know what is due and how much they add up to.
expenses.archiveCopy: Search, filter by time, and browse older data page by page as the archive grows.
expenses.noMatchesMeta: No matching expenses yet. Try a different filter or add a fresh entry.
expenses.emptyCopy: Start with something simple like coffee 50. PlifeOS will auto-categorize it and add it to this week's chart.
expenses.noMatches: No expenses match the current search or date filter.
borrow.archiveCopy: Use search plus pagination to review older borrowed entries as the list grows.
borrow.noMatches: No borrowed entries match the current search or date filter.
borrow.emptyCopy: Add one to start tracking who owes what.
grocery.archiveCopy: Search your grocery archive and page through older items as your list grows.
grocery.noMatches: No grocery items match the current search or date filter.
grocery.emptyCopy: Add your first item above and PlifeOS will keep the archive ready.
habits.name: Habit name
habits.reminderCopy: Best-effort local reminders using your device time while the app is installed or open.
habits.progressCopy: Mark today's completion and browse older habits if your list grows.
habits.noMatches: No habits match your current search or filter.
habits.emptyCopy: Add one like Gym, Reading, or Walk and start marking it daily.
notes.title: Note title
notes.savedCopy: Search your notes, page through older ones, and keep your daily thoughts easy to find.
notes.noMatches: No notes match your current search or date filter.
notes.emptyCopy: Use this for ideas, reminders, planning, and anything you want saved offline.
tasks.title: Task title
tasks.listCopy: Search through open and completed tasks, then page through older items as your list grows.
tasks.noMatches: No tasks match your current search or filter.
tasks.emptyCopy: Start with something simple like task call bank and keep your day list in one place.
journal.title: Entry title
journal.savedCopy: Search your reflections, filter by time, and revisit earlier entries whenever you need context.
journal.noMatches: No journal entries match your current search or date filter.
journal.emptyCopy: Try journal Today I learned something useful and start building a simple reflection habit.
subscriptions.reminderCopy: Set a local reminder time and how many days before the due date you want a heads-up.
subscriptions.name: Netflix
subscriptions.listCopy: Search and page through all recurring charges as your app grows.
subscriptions.noMatches: No subscriptions match the current search.
subscriptions.emptyCopy: Add monthly costs like Netflix, Spotify, or domains to see your recurring load.
reminders.unsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
reminders.habitBodyOne: You still have 1 habit pending today.
reminders.habitBodyMany: You still have {count} habits pending today.
messages.noteFirst: Write a title or note body first.
messages.journalFirst: Write a title or reflection first.
messages.billingDayRange: Enter a billing day between 1 and 31.
messages.leadDaysRange: Lead days must be between 0 and 7.
